title: Emergency department: weekly bulletins for 2026
body: "The Emergency Department Syndromic Surveillance System (EDSSS) monitors the patient attendances each day, and what symptoms patients have, in a network of emergency departments across England and Northern Ireland.  Weekly bulletins are also available for:   2025 2024 2023 2022 2021 2020 2019 2018 2017 2016 2015 2014  "
